parameters.jsCode: const input=items[0].json||{};const rawUrl=(input.podcast_url||input.audio_url||input.url||'').trim();const goal=(input.interest_goal||'General learning value for a busy knowledge worker').trim();const apiKey=(input.assemblyai_api_key||'YOUR_ASSEMBLYAI_API_KEY').trim();if(!rawUrl) throw new Error('Missing `podcast_url` or `audio_url`.');if(apiKey==='YOUR_ASSEMBLYAI_API_KEY') throw new Error('Replace YOUR_ASSEMBLYAI_API_KEY in the Code node, or pass `assemblyai_api_key` in the request body.');const sleep=(ms)=>new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,ms));const pick=(html,baseUrl,patterns)=>{for(const pattern of patterns){const m=html.match(pattern);if(m&&m[1]){try{return new URL(m[1],baseUrl).href;}catch{return m[1];}}}return null;};async function resolveMediaUrl(url){if(/\.(mp3|m4a|mp4|wav|aac|ogg)(\?|$)/i.test(url)) return url;let head=null;try{head=await fetch(url,{method:'HEAD',redirect:'follow'});}catch{}const headType=head?.headers?.get('content-type')||'';const headUrl=head?.url||url;if(headType.startsWith('audio/')||headType.startsWith('video/')) return headUrl;if(/\.(mp3|m4a|mp4|wav|aac|ogg)(\?|$)/i.test(headUrl)) return headUrl;const page=await fetch(url,{redirect:'follow'});const html=await page.text();const media=pick(html,page.url,[/property=["']og:audio["'][^>]*content=["']([^"']+)["']/i,/name=["']twitter:player:stream["'][^>]*content=["']([^"']+)["']/i,/<audio[^>]*src=["']([^"']+)["']/i,/<source[^>]*src=["']([^"']+)["']/i,/enclosure[^>]*url=["']([^"']+)["']/i,/"audio"\s*:\s*"([^"]+)"/i,/"contentUrl"\s*:\s*"([^"]+)"/i]);if(media) return media;throw new Error('Could not find an audio URL on this page. Try a direct MP3/M4A link or an RSS episode link.');}const audioUrl=await resolveMediaUrl(rawUrl);const createRes=await fetch('https://api.assemblyai.com/v2/transcript',{method:'POST',headers:{Authorization:apiKey,'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({audio_url:audioUrl,auto_chapters:true,auto_highlights:true,speaker_labels:false,language_detection:true,summarization:true,summary_model:'informative',summary_type:'bullets'})});const created=await createRes.json();if(!createRes.ok||!created.id) throw new Error(`AssemblyAI submit failed: ${JSON.stringify(created)}`);let transcript=null;for(let i=0;i<90;i++){const pollRes=await fetch(`https://api.assemblyai.com/v2/transcript/${created.id}`,{headers:{Authorization:apiKey}});const data=await pollRes.json();if(!pollRes.ok) throw new Error(`AssemblyAI poll failed: ${JSON.stringify(data)}`);if(data.status==='completed'){transcript=data;break;}if(data.status==='error') throw new Error(`AssemblyAI transcription error: ${data.error||'unknown error'}`);await sleep(10000);}if(!transcript) throw new Error('Timed out waiting for transcript. Increase polling duration if your podcast is very long.');const highlights=(transcript.auto_highlights_result?.results||[]).slice(0,10).map(x=>x.text);const chapters=(transcript.chapters||[]).map(x=>({headline:x.headline,summary:x.summary,start_ms:x.start,end_ms:x.end}));const minutes=Math.round((transcript.audio_duration||0)/60);let score=5;if(highlights.length>=3) score+=1;if(highlights.length>=6) score+=1;if(chapters.length>=2) score+=1;if(chapters.length>=4) score+=1;if(transcript.summary) score+=1;if(minutes>=15&&minutes<=90) score+=1;if(minutes>120) score-=1;score=Math.max(1,Math.min(10,score));const recommendation=score>=8?'Worth a full listen.':'Read the summary first, then decide.';return [{json:{input_url:rawUrl,resolved_audio_url:audioUrl,interest_goal:goal,transcript_id:transcript.id,audio_minutes:minutes,estimated_value_score:score,recommendation,note:'The score is heuristic. Use chapters/highlights/summary to make the final decision.',assemblyai_summary:transcript.summary||'',key_highlights:highlights,chapters,transcript:transcript.text||''}}];
